primary_sources.relevance: Definitive source for calcineurin inhibitors and immunosuppressive drug classifications

primary_sources.name: KDIGO 2017 Clinical Practice Guideline Update for the Diagnosis, Evaluation, Prevention, and Treatment of Chronic Kidney Disease-Mineral and Bone Disorder
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive coverage of phosphate binder classifications and mechanisms of action

secondary_sources.name: American Journal of Kidney Diseases
secondary_sources.relevance: Recent publications on SGLT2 inhibitors and novel nephrology pharmacotherapies
